creator: dchagin@FreeBSD.org
text:
>I can't reproduce. What FreeBSD version/architecture? Did you build the port yourself or used package? If package then from /latest or /quarterly repo?

HEAD/amd64, I use pkg, how to check that repo usesd by pkg?

>The path looks strange. Are strings interleaved or you have custom firefox installation under /home/rootlocal as well?

/usr/local - symlink to /home/rootlocal, where the /home - mountpoint on big disk


try to remove firefox, remove /usr/local/lib/firefox dir and install
